title: Legacy NVIDIA xf86-video-nv Driver Sees First Release In Years
summary: The legacy NVIDIA xf86-video-nv driver receives its first update in over two years, addressing various bug fixes for older GPU support.

title: LACT 0.9 Released With UI Updates, Voltage-Frequency Curve Editor For NVIDIA

title: The shift from AI training to inference is now causing server CPU demand to spike, resulting in consumer CPU price increases as production shifts
summary: AI inference workload demands are causing CPU production shifts away from consumer chips toward server processors, potentially driving up consumer CPU prices as manufacturers reallocate resources.
